title: Invariants Spine Schema v1.0.0
description: Canonical definitions for horror constellation invariants: unbreakable rules derived from historical, geographical, or metaphysical constraints.

CIC.title: Collective Invariant of Consequence
CIC.description: Probability-weighted measure of historical impact. Higher values indicate regions/events where collective trauma or consequence is more likely to manifest.

AOS.title: Actualized Omission Severity
AOS.description: Intensity of unresolved historical trauma or omission. Represents the 'pressure' of unacknowledged events seeking expression.

DET.title: Dynamic Event Tension
DET.description: Real-time tension level for an event or encounter. Governs pacing, escalation, and player agency constraints. Integer steps preferred.

SHCI.title: Spectral-Historical Consistency Index
SHCI.description: Measure of alignment between a spectral entity's behavior and its historical source material. SHCI≈1.0 indicates high-fidelity historical coupling.

then.description: High-CIC regions must have elevated AOS to maintain historical plausibility.
High-fidelity spectral entities should not exceed moderate tension to preserve historical grounding.
